$comment: D-OPT-RELEASE-SYSV-MIXED-CLASS-REG-ARG-DROP F1 (2026-07-07): the 2-TU merge witness. A mixed int+FP-class callee `isum` is DEFINED in helper.c and CALLED from main.c; the two CUs merge into one module and the `release` pipeline optimizes POST-merge, so Inlining splices isum into main across the former CU boundary. This exercises the mir_merge.cpp Arg re-encode (which must thread the flat call-operand position) followed by the inline's position-based actual mapping — a path NO single-TU example reaches (sqlite itself is 2-TU: sqlite3.c + shell.c). RED-ON-DISABLE (release arm): drop the argPosition thread at the mir_merge Arg re-encode and either the merged isum mis-maps its FP actuals (wrong result) or the duplicate-position verifier reds. isum(2,10.0,3,20.0,43.0)=(int)73+2+3=78.
